channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Living in Cromwell Street: A Lodger’s Year with Fred and Rose West
item.description: Karen Hamilton, now 67, recounts her harrowing experience living for a year as a lodger with Fred and Rose West at 25 Cromwell Street, Gloucester, during the early 1990s. Unaware of the couple’s horri...

item.title: Kelowna volunteers deliver vital aid to Cubans amid severe power and fuel shortages
item.description: Two women from Kelowna, British Columbia — Leanne Isaak and Elise Hjalmarson — have travelled to Cuba on a humanitarian mission amid the island nation’s worsening living conditions and widespread blac...

item.title: Pep Guardiola Unhappy as Rayan Cherki’s Showboating Sparks Debate During Man City’s Cup Final Win Over Arsenal
item.description: Manchester City clinched their first major trophy of the 2025/26 season after defeating Arsenal 2-0 in the Carabao Cup final held at Wembley Stadium. Pep Guardiola’s team produced a very strong second...

item.title: Mbeki and Zuma unite in opposing renewed scrutiny of the TRC era
item.description: In his TimesLIVE opinion piece, Ghaleb Cachalia notes the surprising alignment between former South African presidents Thabo Mbeki and Jacob Zuma as they jointly resist efforts to reopen unresolved is...

item.title: Why I Continue Packing My Teenagers’ Lunches
item.description: Beth Elliott, a mother from Ottawa, shares her personal perspective on why she continues to make lunches for her teenage daughters, despite societal expectations that teens should be more independent....

item.title: 79-Year-Old Woman Beheaded in Bellville South, 63-Year-Old Arrested
item.description: The Bellville South community is in shock following the brutal murder of a 79-year-old woman, whose decapitated body was found at her home on Thursday night. The victim, known as Aunty Connie, lived a...

item.title: Manchester City Claim Carabao Cup, Denying Arsenal Historic Quadruple Bid
item.description: Ah, man! Manchester City don show Arsenal who be boss, carting away the Carabao Cup after a 2-0 victory at Wembley Stadium. The Gunners, who were on a 12-match unbeaten streak, couldn’t withstand City...

item.title: Congressman Thomas Massie Claims Lobby Group AIPAC Assigns Representatives to Influence Republican Votes on Israel
item.description: US Congressman Thomas Massie, representing Kentucky's 4th Congressional District, stated on the Tucker Carlson Show that every Republican member of Congress is assigned a representative from the Ameri...

item.title: Energy Minister warns of oil supply risks amid Asian shipping disruptions
item.description: Australia is considering using its liquefied natural gas (LNG) and coal exports as strategic leverage to help maintain access to vital oil supplies from Asian partners. This move comes in response to ...

item.title: TMC Launches 'Fighter Didi' Teaser Portraying Mamata Banerjee as Bengal's Defender Ahead of 2026 Polls
item.description: The Trinamool Congress (TMC) has released an animated teaser video titled 'Fighter Didi' on its social media platforms, projecting West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee as the ultimate defender o...

item.title: Eucharia Anunobi shines in ‘Keke 2 Mansion’, a balanced yet familiar Nollywood drama
item.description: Even though *Keke 2 Mansion* follow one kain overused Nollywood formula of rags-to-riches story, the movie still manage to hold attention through fine acting and good direction. The film, wey Stanley ...

item.title: Iran Warns of Permanent Hormuz Closure If U.S. Attacks Power Plants
item.description: Iran don issue one strong statement say dem go block the Strait of Hormuz for good if President Donald Trump carry out him threat to bomb their power plants. The Iranian military talk this one on Sund...

item.title: Police seek court orders to exhume suspected mass grave at Makaburini Cemetery in Kericho
item.description: Police in Kericho County are investigating claims of a suspected mass grave at Makaburini Cemetery after a member of the public reported a suspicious grave at the site. Officers, together with Scenes ...

item.title: Manchester City defeat Arsenal 2-0 in Carabao Cup final as Nico O'Reilly scores twice
item.description: Manchester City beat Arsenal 2-0 in the Carabao Cup final at Wembley, with academy graduate Nico O'Reilly scoring both goals in a four‑minute spell against the previously resilient Gunners defence. Th...

item.title: Marcos Calls for Bayanihan Amid Fuel Price Crisis and Middle East Tensions
item.description: Amid rising fuel prices due to ongoing conflicts in the Middle East, President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has urged Filipinos to embrace the spirit of bayanihan, a Filipino tradition of communal cooperation...

item.title: St John Rigby College reports isolated suspected meningitis case unrelated to Kent outbreak with declining cases
item.description: St John Rigby College in Orrell has reported a single suspected meningococcal meningitis case among its students, but authorities confirm it is unrelated to the ongoing outbreak in Kent. The college p...

item.title: Military Experts: Power Infrastructure Targetable Under Specific Legal Conditions
item.description: In the context of the escalating Iran-US-Israel conflict, military experts have clarified that power infrastructure can be lawfully targeted under international humanitarian law if it meets strict cri...

item.title: Donald Trump deploys ICE agents to US airports for mass immigration arrests
item.description: Donald Trump has announced plans to send ICE agents into US airports starting Monday to arrest 'all illegal immigrants'. In a post on Truth Social, the president praised ICE agents as 'brilliant and p...

item.title: How Teens Can Create Their Own Summer Jobs When Hiring Is Scarce
item.description: In this opinion piece, Toronto-based financial planner Anita Bruinsma discusses the rising difficulty teenagers and young adults face in finding summer jobs. With youth unemployment above pre-pandemic...

item.title: Awoniyi helps Nottingham Forest secure 3-0 win over Tottenham to move away from relegation
item.description: Taiwo Awoniyi don score one goal as Nottingham Forest waka enter 3-0 win against Tottenham Hotspur for Premier League on Sunday. The win don help dem reduce di wahala wey dey for relegation. Forest pl...
